name: IdsDmMbrshDmFmlyLmtExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH src AS (SELECT t.SRC_SYS_CD, t.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, t.YR_NO, t.PROD_ACCUM_ID, t.ACCUM_NO, t.BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_CD, t.BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_NM, t.BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, t.BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM, t.LMT_AMT, t.BLUEKC_DPLY_IN, t.MBR_360_DPLY_IN, t.EXTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, t.INTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, t.PLN_YR_EFF_DT, t.PLN_YR_END_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_FMLY_LMT t) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, YR_NO, PROD_ACCUM_ID, ACCUM_NO, BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_CD, BNF_SUM_DTL_NTWK_TYP_NM, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM, LMT_AMT, BLUEKC_DPLY_IN, MBR_360_DPLY_IN, EXTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, INTRNL_DPLY_ACCUM_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.DataMartRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, CAST(PLN_YR_EFF_DT AS datetime2(3)) AS PLN_YR_EFF_DT, CAST(PLN_YR_END_DT AS datetime2(3)) AS PLN_YR_END_DT FROM src
